economic_notes: Gitga'at Development Corporation, Ocean Destiny Joint Venture, and Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership consolidated. Gitga'at Forestry Inc. and Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Investments in North Co-Corp Ferry Services Ltd. (33%), North Coast Skeena First Nation Stewardship Society (17.93%), Great Bear Carbon Credit Limited Partnership (6%). Hartley Bay Fuel station operated. COVID-19 noted as significant event near year-end.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Large surplus of $12M driven by significant 'Other government funding' of $5,088,054 (vs $20,325 prior year) and other revenue of $7,537,574 (vs $4,511,978 prior year) — possible non-recurring items but not explicitly labeled as such. Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership transitioned from consolidated entity to modified equity entity during the year, with $1,186,531 transition adjustment recorded in net financial assets statement. Marketable securities increased dramatically from $2,571,827 to $12,099,748 due to purchase of GICs. Capital lease obligations nearly extinguished ($23,243 remaining). No long-term debt. COVID-19 disclosed as significant event. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text.
